acceptance_targets: [ch06_dialogue_001] Across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:91, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:309, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:469, no more than one line uses the 'both can be true / it can be both' construction, and Nami's replacement line contains a concrete sensory or bodily image that could only belong to her voice.

[ch06_prose_001] In the revised versions of snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:67, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:99, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:401, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:473, at least three cited passages stay anchored to a visible market detail or Iven's body instead of summarizing Reedmouth as a whole, and no scene contains more than one generalized 'Reedmouth/Marrow Market is X' sentence.

[FBR-007] Pass if reading snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2624-2629 gives a concrete market-specific aftershock without relying on 'That landed.' Fail if the scene still announces the beat through generic impact shorthand.

findings.acceptance_test: Across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:91, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:309, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:469, no more than one line uses the 'both can be true / it can be both' construction, and Nami's replacement line contains a concrete sensory or bodily image that could only belong to her voice.
findings.problem: The same balancing formula migrates across speakers: Lale gets two near-identical versions of the line, then Nami closes a later argument with the same abstract construction. That weakens idiolect separation at exactly the point the style bible wants Lale's measured clause logic to stay distinct from Nami's sensory, literal eeriness.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:91 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:309, keep at most one version of Lale's balancing rejoinder. At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:469, replace Nami's abstract mediator line with language rooted in her own body-and-omen register so the beat lands as Nami rather than as a reusable family placeholder.

findings.acceptance_test: In the revised versions of snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:67, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:99, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:401, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:473, at least three cited passages stay anchored to a visible market detail or Iven's body instead of summarizing Reedmouth as a whole, and no scene contains more than one generalized 'Reedmouth/Marrow Market is X' sentence.
findings.problem: The chapter repeatedly exits immediate scene pressure to deliver polished Reedmouth theses ('official in Reedmouth...', 'That was the trick of this place', 'Money in Reedmouth...', 'Marrow Market understood debt...'). Once or twice this works; at this frequency it becomes a prose formula, smoothing the chapter's comic-humiliating roughness into authorial captioning.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:67, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:99, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:401, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:473 so at least three of those generalizing sentences become scene-bound observation, action, or body-state attached to a specific person, object, or physical pressure already present in the moment. Keep no more than one town-sized thesis sentence per scene.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if reading snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2624-2629 gives a concrete market-specific aftershock without relying on 'That landed.' Fail if the scene still announces the beat through generic impact shorthand.
findings.problem: Full-book style pattern: the standalone 'That landed' impact beat appears in 10 chapters. Here it shows up at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2628, inside the corpse-jam aftermath. In a chapter whose strength is humiliating comic escalation, this generic beat drains specificity from the fallout. REPLACE.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2624-2629 so the shame and blame register through the market's physical aftermath: who keeps cleaning, who refuses eye contact, what part of the lane still stinks, what debt is now visible. Keep the comic-curdled tone, but lose the stock impact sentence.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the collision of sanctity, lust, labor, rot, and family resentment. In edge cases, choose the more concrete, uncomfortable, and character-specific rendering over symbolic safety; if an image or action feels too polite for the pressure, it is probably wrong.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, violence, shame, grief, or economic pressure drives a scene, vague language counts as a failed beat; replace euphemism with the exact bodily, social, or material consequence the character experiences.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm across dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for ritual speech, emphasis, or deliberate character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count, dialogue density, and narrative movement aggressively: follow ordeal with meal, revelation with labor, schism with care, and public spectacle with close-bodied aftermath so no adjacent chapters share the same structural rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, bodily, locally sacred, and unsanitized; lyrical only when pressure earns it, never as a decorative default.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person rotating among the five siblings; each scene stays inside one consciousness and lets the river press through perception rather than omniscient explanation.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate muscular propulsion with denser lyric accumulation; peak scenes should tighten and clarify rather than dissolve into fragmentary haze.
